# Blue Staffy UK — llms.txt

> We're the team behind BlueStaffyUK. Based in Glasgow, we breed KC-registered Blue Staffordshire Bull Terrier puppies for loving homes across the UK. Every puppy is health-tested, microchipped, and socialised before going to their forever family.

## Sitemaps
- [XML Sitemap](/sitemap_index.xml): All crawlable and indexable pages.

## Core Pages

- [Homepage](https://bluestaffyuk.uk/): Official home for KC-registered Blue Staffy puppies, ethically bred for UK families.
- [Blue Staffy UK Breeders](/blue-staffy-uk-breeders/): KC-registered Blue Staffy puppies in Glasgow, bred for loyal family homes with full health checks.
- [Buy Blue Staffy Puppies UK](/buy-blue-staffy-puppies-uk/): Reserve current Blue Staffy puppies — KC registered, microchipped, and health screened.
- [Blue Staffy Puppies for Sale UK](/buy-staffy-puppies-for-sale-uk/): Browse available Blue Staffy puppies for sale across the UK from verified KC breeders.
- [Contact BlueStaffyUK](/uk-blue-staffy-breeders-contact/): Get in touch about available puppies, reservations, or general enquiries.

## Guides & Breed Information

- [Blue Staffy Puppy Buying Guide](/uk-blue-staffy-puppy-buying-guide/): 15 questions to ask any breeder, red flags to avoid, true year-1 costs, and a 30-day home checklist.
- [Staffordshire Bull Terrier Guide UK](/uk-staffordshire-bull-terrier-guide/): Temperament, training, breed traits, health, and life with a Staffy in the UK.
- [Blue Staffy Health UK](/blue-staffy-health-uk/): KC health testing standards, common conditions, DNA screening, and ethical welfare practices.

## About BlueStaffyUK

BlueStaffyUK is a UK-based Staffordshire Bull Terrier breeder located in Glasgow, Scotland. All puppies are Kennel Club (KC) registered, microchipped, vaccinated, health-tested, and raised in a family home environment. We breed exclusively Blue Staffies and are committed to responsible, ethical breeding practices in line with KC standards. We do not sell to puppy farms or third-party dealers.
